prompt: A surreal, hyper-realistic architectural photograph of a massive, monolithic stone structure. The structure is composed of dozens of distinct, smaller staircases. On every individual staircase, the angle and the flow of tiny faceless figures is clearly moving steeply downwards. However, the overarching shape and trajectory of the entire monolithic structure is unmistakably rocketing upwards into the clouds. An uncanny optical illusion of local descent but global ascent. No text, no numbers, no charts. Highly detailed, cinematic atmosphere, 8k.
visual_logic: Every individual local staircase is angled downwards with people descending, but the overarching global structure they form is unmistakably ascending into the sky, mirroring how local trends reverse when aggregated.
